subcodes.first_line: O herald of God's Kingdom! Thy latest letter was received, and concerning the challenges and difficulties in the matter of election [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی ملکوت الهی نامه اخیر شما رسید و از مشاکل و صعوبات در امر انتخاب
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @elections, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @parliaments; constitutional government, @past, present and future of Iran, @non-participation in politics, @poems and quotation from poetry
